sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30293" key="e)gklastri/dia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκλαστρίδια</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n30293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ear-rings</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.97</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
